text: Your comfy_inspect has a bug I reported earlier and it's still marked UNVERIFIED. On a workflow containing ONLY CheckpointLoaderSimple, EmptyLatentImage, KSampler and SaveImage — no img2img anywhere — it reported "img2img levers present: True". That's a false positive. Fix it, and this time write nova_forge/tests/comfy_inspect.py so it stops being UNVERIFIED. Your test cases decide what 'working' means, so choose them like someone who wants to catch their own mistakes, not like someone proving themselves right.
